name: constant_image_to_output
purpose: First visible Vuo runtime proof node: canonical image.constant, browser alias top.constant, mapped to my_ConstantImage.
acceptance: saved node type is image.constant; top.constant is alias only
my_ConstantImage emits a VuoImage with the requested width, height, and color
ConstantImage -> Blend proves stateless image transform input
ConstantImage -> KeepPreviousFrame proves frame state input
ConstantImage -> RenderTarget proves output boundary when paired with scene command body proof
